subcodes.first_line: O thou who gazest upon the Kingdom of Abhá! Whatsoever the Pen inscribeth and the tongue proclaimeth is but a drop from the surging ocean [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ناظر بملکوت ابهی آنچه قلم تحریر نماید و لسان تقریر کند رشحی از بحر متموج در
subcodes.subjects: @mysteries and their discovery; the mystical vision, @immateriality; ineffability of soul; spirit, @spiritual transformation, @nearness and remoteness, @presence of; reunion with God, @love and unity, @spiritual communication; connections of the heart, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities
